name: Here Come the Hot Boxes: Unix/RDBMS TPC-A Performance Analysis (1992)
description: A brief 1992 Aberdeen Group section analyzing the emergence of Unix/RDBMS servers as leaders in TPC-A transaction processing price-performance benchmarks. Bull's DPX/2 and Sun's Sparcserver took TPC-A leadership positions pushing best price-performance below $10K/TPS-A, and Aberdeen explains why Unix/RDBMS vendors are increasingly favoring TPC-A over TPC-B for competitive benchmarking.
